summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: Erdős–Ko–Rado n=6, k=3 → max intersecting family size C(5,2)=10. All 20 3-subsets drawn as 6-slot bit indicators in 4×5 grid. Slot 0 (fixed element 1) recolored GREEN on the 10 star-family sets. ValueTracker idx_tr walks through them with always_redraw GREEN highlight border + running count.
